name: @ontology-search/road-catalog
description: Curated OpenDRIVE road catalog. Vendors a pinned, license-clean .xodr (Persival asam-openx-assets, MPL-2.0) plus its DISCOVERED topology (drivable lanes, per-road length) so the authoring gates, the qc self-test, and the browser viewer all resolve the SAME road bytes by `logicFile`. Single source: what you validate is what you see.
